fields.helpText: This field stores the duplicate original UID.   DICOM Tag:  Study Instance UID (0020,000D), Series Instance UID (0020,000E), SOP Instance UID (0008,0018).
This field stores the new assigned UID.   DICOM Tag:  Study Instance UID (0020,000D), Series Instance UID (0020,000E), SOP Instance UID (0008,0018).
This field stores the accession number associated with the UID.
This is the patient associated with the UID.

fields.setOfCodes: 1:STUDY INSTANCE UID;2:SERIES INSTANCE UID;3:SOP INSTANCE UID;
fields.helpText: This field contains the original UID type (ex. SOP).
This field will store the STUDY UID related to this record.   DICOM Tag: Study Instance UID (0020,000D).
This field will store the SERIES UID related to this record.   DICOM Tag: Series Instance UID (0020,000E).
